howItWorks.intro: This download time calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Download Time
rules.explanation: File size in megabits divided by speed in megabits per second.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: Why is my download slower than my speed?
faq.a: Real-world throughput is typically 60-80% of advertised speed due to overhead.
Mbps is megabits (speed). MBps is megabytes (file size). 1 MBps = 8 Mbps.

howWeCalculate.intro: This download time calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
